atoms.name: Baseline
atoms.description: Allows all intents with no capability caps. The open policy floor for development and experimentation.

atoms.name: Security Baseline
atoms.description: Requires Signed trust level for capability dispatch. Denies unsigned shell command execution. Caps drachma to 50 per session.

atoms.name: Production Read-Only
atoms.description: Denies all write and mutate intents targeting production contexts. Allows read, observe, and report intents. For SRE persona in prod-adjacent contexts.

atoms.name: Development
atoms.description: Allows all intents. Adds require-confirm for destructive operations above drachma cost 20.
